summary: Tested signed-JSON audit-trail export feature end-to-end. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed (schema, include_logs hash integrity, redact_seed=false, 404 for missing job, verify valid/tampered/missing-signature, passphrase redaction with real job, in-memory path, smoke regression). Frontend: export-job-btn and export-row-{id} both produce a JSON file with correct filename pattern seed-recovery-{job8}-{iso}.json, schema='seed-recovery-audit/v1', job.job_id matches, signature.value is 64 hex. Header export uses include_logs=true. export-reveal-toggle only renders when job.found_seed is set (correct behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1040 lines; consider splitting export/verify and job lifecycle into separate modules to stay under the 700-line guideline.
export_job: when job exists only in JOBS (no Mongo doc), config_snapshot/label/created_at silently default to {}/None. Acceptable but could surface a warning field.
JobHistory.doExport swallows all errors with empty catch (catch (_) {}); user gets no feedback if the export fails. Consider a toast or inline error like JobMonitor does.
Filename uses ISO timestamp with ':' replaced but '.' too (replace(/[:.]/g,'-')) — fine, just note it is filesystem-safe.
/api/exports/verify accepts any dict; could be tightened with a Pydantic model + max-payload limit to prevent large-payload DoS.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 short-lived test jobs (TEST_export_redact with passphrase, TEST_export_inmem) during tests. All TEST_-prefixed jobs and the test-selected running job were stopped and deleted via the public API at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export endpoints live in /app/backend/server.py around lines 658-801. HMAC signing key is at /app/backend/data/.sign_key (persisted). Frontend export logic: JobMonitor.jsx uses include_logs=true and redact_seed=!revealSeed; JobHistory.jsx always uses include_logs=true and redact_seed=true. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_export.py is the regression suite for this feature. Run with: export REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> && pytest backend/tests/test_export.py -v.
